tools.Name: DeerFlow
tools.Description: An open-source super agent harness that orchestrates sub-agents, memory, and sandboxes to handle complex tasks.
tools.Use_Case: Building, orchestrating, and deploying autonomous agent systems that handle multi-step tasks from minutes to hours.

tools.Name: Hindsight
tools.Description: An agent memory system that uses biomimetic data structures to enable agents to learn and build mental models over time.
tools.Use_Case: Creating agents that require long-term memory, user personalization, and the ability to learn from past experiences.

tools.Name: BitNet
tools.Description: Official inference framework for 1-bit LLMs (e.g., BitNet b1.58), offering high-performance, lossless inference on standard hardware.
tools.Use_Case: Deploying LLMs efficiently on resource-constrained devices (CPU/Edge) with significantly reduced energy consumption.
